About

{/* Bio text */}

I'm a data analyst and ML engineer pursuing a Master's in Computer & Systems Engineering at Technische Universität Ilmenau, Germany. My work spans the full pipeline — from data wrangling and statistical modelling to deploying real-time AI systems.

I've built production-grade systems including{" "} multi-camera face recognition access control,{" "} PPE safety monitoring dashboards, and drone-based object tracking. Equally comfortable designing RESTful APIs as training YOLOv8 models.

My approach is pragmatic: pick the right tool, build it clean, and make the insights{" "} actually understandable for the people who need them.
